chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3393 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 11.08.2025 Mr. Raham Ali, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Through this petition, the petitioners seek post-arrest bail in FIR No.605 of 2025 under Section 6/9(c), SCNS Act, 2022 registered at Police Station Korangi Industrial Area. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and it is only pending required assent of the Governor, therefore, the petitioners have an alternate remedy to approach the learned trial Court/Special Tribunal/or competent Court, as the case may be, under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioners are at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
